title: phyllota urodon
intro: Phyllota urodon, also known as Australian peppermint bush, is a flowering plant native to Australia that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllota urodon include relieving digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Phyllota urodon can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or oil, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
